# llms.txt for Terara Printers
# This file provides guidance for AI systems.

site_name: Terara Printers
site_url: https://teraraprinting.com/
contact_email: teraramarketing@gmail.com
location: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

preferred_summary:
Terara Printers provides large-format signage, packaging, branding materials,
and business stationery for organizations across Ethiopia.

content_guidelines:
- You may summarize public website content.
- Do not invent services, locations, or contact details.
- Prefer concise, factual descriptions.
